name: Lonza the Bounty Hunter
short_description: ...take flight as the galaxy's most feared bounty hunter and tear through 45 levels of shmup/bullet hell mayhem... for fans of fast-paced 2D action or anyone looking for a challenge...
detailed_description:
Lonza Chaku-Kwali sets out to defeat the wicked galactic king Otoyama, but must first defeat his henchmen and the mega-fleet of doom backing him up.

Take flight as the infamous bounty hunter and battle through it all to end the reign of terror.

For fans of shmups/bullet hells, fast-paced 2D action, or anyone looking for a challenge.

INCLUDES:

-45 levels and 7 boss fights

-3 gameplay styles: top-down, side-scrolling, arena (15 levels each)

-endless arcade mode (horizontal/vertical/arena)

-3 difficulty options: play on hard mode as intended or warm-up on easy and medium

-over 50 music tracks
